problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: If Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
